description_long: This bar features a compact, L-shaped counter with a dark marble-like surface and three round, red-cushioned bar stools with metallic bases. The back wall is adorned with two shelves holding green bottles, set against ornate red and cream damask wallpaper. A large, wall-mounted flat screen is positioned to the left of the shelves, providing entertainment for patrons. The flooring is a dark, herringbone-patterned wood, adding a touch of sophistication. The bar is enclosed on three sides by walls covered in the same decorative wallpaper, creating an intimate, cozy atmosphere. The overall design suggests a classic, upscale bar suitable for urban nightlife.
description: A cozy, L-shaped bar with a marble counter, red-cushioned stools, and ornate wallpaper, featuring bottle shelves and a wall-mounted screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marble bar counter, three red-cushioned stools, bottle shelves, and a wall-mounted screen against ornate wallpaper.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the marble counter, the arrangement of the stools, and the large wall-mounted screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patterned wallpaper with no visible bar features or furnishings.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the wallpapered exterior and a partial glimpse of the bar's interior layout.
attribute_architectural_style: Classic with ornate Victorian-inspired wallpaper and modern bar furnishings
